sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_logic (id Int32, value1 Nullable(UInt8), value2 Nullable(UInt8), value3 Nullable(UInt8));
INSERT INTO test_logic VALUES (1, 1, NULL, 0), (2, NULL, NULL, 0), (3, 1, 1, 1), (4, 0, 0, 0);
SELECT id, or(value1, value2, value3) AS logical_or_result FROM test_logic WHERE value1 IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, or(value1, 0, value2) AS logical_or_result, (value1 AND value2) AS logical_and_result FROM test_logic WHERE value3 = 1;
SELECT id, value1, value2, or(value1, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_logic WHERE value3 = 0)) AS nested_or FROM test_logic WHERE value1 < 2 AND value2 IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, (SELECT or(value1, value2) FROM test_logic) AS overall_logical_or FROM test_logic;
SELECT id, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_logic WHERE value1 AND value2 = 1) AS count_true WHERE or(value1, value2) = 1;
CREATE TABLE temp_logic AS SELECT id, or(value1, value2) AS temp_result FROM test_logic WHERE value3 IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, or((value1 AND value2), (SELECT MAX(value3) FROM temp_logic)) AS complex_logic FROM test_logic;
WITH (SELECT or(value1, value2) FROM test_logic WHERE value1 = 1) AS subquery_or SELECT id, value1 AND (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM temp_logic WHERE temp_result = 1) AS condition_result FROM test_logic;
